brief.business_model: Lead generation — connects patients to dentists in Canadian cities

objectives.title: Technical SEO audit
objectives.description: Crawl https://dentalnearyou.ca — identify broken links, missing meta, slow pages, duplicate content, canonical issues.

objectives.title: City page audit (10 cities)
objectives.description: Review /en/[city] pages for Toronto, Vancouver, Calgary, Edmonton, Ottawa and more. Check H1, meta title, meta description, and keyword density per primary keyword.

objectives.title: Meta tag optimisation
objectives.description: Rewrite title tags and meta descriptions for all city and service pages. Target primary keywords: dentist [city], emergency dentist [city], dentist accepting new patients [city].

objectives.title: Internal link map
objectives.description: Build a complete internal link graph for https://dentalnearyou.ca. Identify orphan pages, link equity gaps, and opportunities for city-to-service linking.

objectives.title: Content gap analysis
objectives.description: Compare existing topic coverage against top 10 SERP competitors. List missing topics per city and service combination.

objectives.title: CDCP page optimisation
objectives.description: Optimise /en/cdcp for 'Canada Dental Care Plan' queries. Update content, schema markup, and internal links.

objectives.title: Schema markup audit
objectives.description: Check LocalBusiness and Dentist schema on city pages. Generate schema snippets where missing.

objectives.title: Backlink profile review
objectives.description: Export current backlink profile. Identify toxic links, lost links, and high-value acquisition targets.

objectives.title: KPI baseline report
objectives.description: Pull baseline metrics for: organic traffic, keyword rankings, pages indexed, backlinks. Set targets per city. Deliver as CSV + summary.

objectives.title: Quick-win keyword targeting
objectives.description: Find keywords ranking positions 11–20. Produce a list of 20 pages with highest traffic-on-nudge potential.
